goal: Hunt for a small, real, A-share-specific idiosyncratic edge (alpha1) using the onset construct the user proposed: the geometry of the recent 1-3 candlesticks RELATIVE TO their position within the prior 3-9 bars -- a dynamic 3-12 bar combination. Rationale: structural candle geometry (not smoothed scalars) + relative-position normalization (scale/vol/regime invariant, fixes the non-stationarity that flipped earlier signals) on A-shares (an inefficient, retail emerging market -- the one regime where the candlestick literature says an edge can survive) and matching the V12.31 production rules. METHOD IS NOT NOVEL (large candlestick+ML literature); the contribution is an HONEST, leakage-free, multi-split, cost-aware, market-neutral test that separates a real small edge from the usual candlestick overfit. Reuses existing A-share OHLC -> $0.
env: Use .venv-xpu. D1 = data/processed/ashares_tushare_v1.parquet has OHLCV. Reuse src/train_tcn_wf (SPLITS, build_anchor_sequences, select_feature_columns), src/identify/neutral_targets (market/sector neutral target), src/identify/run_neutral_identify.long_short, src/evaluation/onset_eval (clustered_bootstrap), src/models/tcn_cross_attn + src/identify/contrastive_encoder. Test anchors per split: data/processed/wf_samples_split{1,2,3}.parquet.
discipline: FIX THE NB5 MISTAKE: never judge alpha on a single split. Evaluate ALL 3 walk-forward splits + pooled; report market-neutral long-short Sharpe GROSS and NET of 0.2% round-trip cost; clustered CIs; multi-seed for learned models; pre-register the feature set; use each test split once. SIGN-K1 defines the alpha verdict.
acceptanceCriteria: verifyCommand (pytest tests/algo) passes
Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic, <5s, CPU); REAL tasks gate on machinery-runs + committed stats.json under results/candle/; findings recorded, never gated (SIGN-R1)
REAL eval covers ALL 3 splits + pooled, market-neutral, with GROSS and NET-of-cost long-short Sharpe + clustered CIs (SIGN-K1)
Point-in-time: candle features use only bars ending strictly before the target date
$0 new LLM cost

tasks.title: Candle geometry + relative-position feature builder
tasks.rationale: Per-bar scale-free candle geometry + rolling relative-position features over the prior window -- the parametric, learnable form of the V7c expert rules.
acceptanceCriteria: per-bar geometry on an OHLCV frame: body=(C-O)/range, upper_wick, lower_wick, close_loc=(C-L)/(H-L), range_over_atr, gap vs prior close (all scale-free, NaN-safe for range=0)

rolling relative-position features over prior N bars: close percentile in prior-N high-low range, breakout flag (C > max prior-N high), dist-from-prior-N-low in ATR units, consecutive higher-lows count, volume ratio recent vs prior-N mean, compression (recent range / prior-N range)
hermetic synthetic OHLCV test: features finite, scale-invariant (scaling all prices leaves geometry unchanged), breakout flag correct on a constructed breakout
tasks.notes: DONE: src/onset/candle_geometry.py (per_bar_geometry + relative_position + candle_features + panel wrapper; scale-invariant, point-in-time). 3 hermetic tests green (finite, scale-invariance, breakout flag).

tasks.title: Dynamic 3-12 bar pattern assembler (flat features + sequence)
tasks.rationale: Assemble K1 features over the recent window into (a) a flat hand-engineered vector (recent 1-3 bars geometry + their relative position vs prior 3-9) for LightGBM, and (b) a [W, n_geom] sequence for the learned encoder.
acceptanceCriteria: anchor_features(panel, anchor_keys, recent=3, prior=9) -> flat feature frame per anchor (point-in-time: bars strictly before target date)
anchor_sequences(panel, anchor_keys, window) -> [N, W, n_geom] geometry sequence + valid mask (reuse build_anchor_sequences pattern)
hermetic synthetic test: shapes correct; point-in-time respected (no bar on/after the target date used)
tasks.notes: DONE: src/onset/candle_pattern.py (anchor_features flat + anchor_sequences, reuse build_anchor_sequences). 2 hermetic tests green incl point-in-time (future bars do not leak).

tasks.title: REAL ($0): hand-engineered candle features -> LightGBM, all-split market-neutral cost-aware
tasks.rationale: Honest alpha test, path A. Does the candle-geometry/relative-position vector predict the market-neutral forward return out-of-sample, surviving cost across all splits?
acceptanceCriteria: for each split: train LGBM on the split train window candle features, predict the split's wf_samples test anchors
market-neutral target (neutral_targets); report per-split AND pooled: market-neutral RankIC + long-short Sharpe GROSS and NET of 0.2% round-trip + clustered CIs
writes results/candle/lgbm.json; hermetic smoke green; real run executed + committed; verdict per SIGN-K1 recorded in progress.md
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL. FINDING: candle features give pooled market-neutral RankIC +0.039 [+0.016,+0.065] (EXCLUDES 0 -- strongest cross-sectional signal yet). But tradable: pooled NET long-short Sharpe 0.54, net mean CI [-0.003,+0.009] spans 0; split3 net negative. SIGN-K1: net>0 in 2/3 splits but pooled net CI spans 0 -> NOT alpha1 (small real signal, not cost-surviving/regime-stable). lgbm.json committed.

tasks.title: REAL (XPU, $0): learned candle-sequence encoder, same honest eval
tasks.rationale: Path B: feed the candle geometry sequence (last ~12 bars) into the TCN / contrastive encoder; same all-split market-neutral cost-aware eval, multi-seed.
acceptanceCriteria: uses K2 anchor_sequences (geometry channels) + the existing encoder (tcn_cross_attn or contrastive_encoder), predicts market-neutral target
all-split + pooled, market-neutral RankIC + GROSS/NET long-short Sharpe + clustered CIs, >=3 seeds (report mean +/- across seeds)
writes results/candle/seq.json; hermetic smoke <30s green; real run executed + committed; verdict recorded
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL(XPU,328s,3 splits x3 seeds). FINDING: learned candle-seq pooled market-neutral RankIC +0.062 [+0.036,+0.089] (excludes 0, > K3 flat +0.039); pooled NET long-short Sharpe 0.63, net mean CI [-0.0022,+0.0099] spans 0 -> not cost-surviving. Same verdict as K3. seq.json committed.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): ablation -- candle geometry vs smoothed-factor baseline
tasks.rationale: Does candle geometry ADD anything over the 165 smoothed factors? Train LGBM on (factors) vs (factors + candle) vs (candle only); same honest eval.
acceptanceCriteria: three feature sets, all-split market-neutral cost-aware eval; report incremental long-short Sharpe (net) of adding candle geometry
writes results/candle/ablation.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; finding recorded
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL (after fixing a _fwd_r5 leak in factor_cols that gave RankIC 0.825). FINDING: candle geometry is COMPLEMENTARY to smoothed factors -- pooled net long-short Sharpe factors 0.81 -> factors+candle 1.76 (incremental +0.95), RankIC 0.061 -> 0.083. candle-alone weak/negative net. ablation.json committed. Per-split SIGN-K1 verdict in K6.

tasks.title: Synthesis + explicit alpha1 verdict
tasks.rationale: Aggregate K3/K4/K5 into a table + figure and apply the SIGN-K1 alpha verdict rule explicitly (real edge vs overfit vs null).
acceptanceCriteria: reads results/candle/* -> results/candle/summary.md + paper/sections/figures/candle_alpha_summary.png
computes the alpha1 verdict: REAL only if pooled NET long-short Sharpe CI excludes 0 AND net Sharpe > 0 in >=2/3 splits; else 'overfit/single-split' or 'null'
hermetic smoke green; real run + committed
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL: src/onset/summarize_candle.py -> summary.md + figure. VERDICT: no confirmed alpha1; factors+candle PROMISING (pooled net CI excludes 0, Sharpe 1.76, incremental +0.95) but per-split unconfirmed; candle-only null after cost. full gate 67 passed.
